base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_black_knight_walk — a character from 1986 castlevania. Black Knight (Armor) — 2-frame slow advance. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Black Knight (Armor) — 2-frame slow advance; swings a heavy weapon; takes multiple whip hits. Stone guardian of castle halls. Levels 2, 6
